subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in exploring a collaboration with our team.

I’d be happy to arrange an introductory call. We can offer the following time windows next week:
- 21 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 (our local time)
- 22 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00
- 23 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which date and a specific time within one of these windows works best for you, and we’ll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding internal contact details, we’re not able to share direct phone lines or internal directories. However, you can find the appropriate public contact channels on our website, and any requests routed that way will reach the right stakeholders.

Looking forward to your reply.

Best regards,
Agent
